description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 3, 2024 at 2:20 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on Toland Street at Jerrold Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling north eastbound on Toland Street and came to a stop at a stop sign at the intersection with Jerrold Avenue. 
To the left of the Waymo AV, a heavy truck was stopped, facing the same direction as the Waymo AV, but in the opposing lane of travel 
and partially within the intersection with Jerrold Avenue. As the Waymo AV began to proceed forward from a stop, the heavy truck began 
making a wide right turn. The Waymo AV came to a stop and the rear passenger side of the heavy truck made contact with the front driver 
side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The 
Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
